\tzpentry{ID3525}{Toroidal Propagator Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3525 introduces Toroidal Propagator Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ G_\text{toroid}(r) = A \, r^n \, e^{-\frac{r^2}{2\sigma^2}} \]
